name: Horizontal Flow Wrapper
description: Packs products horizontally — bread, candy, biscuit, wafer, vegetables. Suitable for regular-shaped items on a conveyor.

name: Vertical Form Fill Seal (VFFS)
description: Forms bag from roll film, fills, and seals. Handles granules, powders, nuts, chips, and frozen items.

name: Multihead Weigher
description: High-speed combination weigher for snacks, frozen food, hardware, and produce. Typically paired with VFFS machines.
